scenario.name: SIP Register
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/UDP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:user1@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:user1@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:user1@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0
